name: maxtac-core
description: Core MaxTAC workflow, workspace, ledger, canonical result contracts, reporting, and goal-bounded subagent orchestration.

interface.shortDescription: Core MaxTAC research workflow and ledgers.
interface.longDescription: MaxTAC Core coordinates authorized vulnerability research without loading domain-specific source, binary, web, supply-chain, Android, Apple, or Microsoft guidance. It manages the research workspace, durable research library, primitive and chain ledgers, canonical result contracts, goal-bounded auditor/debater prompts, validation, proof, and reporting flow.
defaultPrompt: Use MaxTAC Core to initialize this authorized research workspace.
Use MaxTAC Core to update findings and plan the next validation step.
Use MaxTAC Core to create a canonical result contract for this review.
